global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with promotional text and a call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a food delivery service with a special sale.

elements.label: Purple background
elements.description: A solid purple background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant backdrop for the ad.

elements.label: Empty space
elements.description: A blank area in the center of the ad, possibly reserved for an image or graphic.

elements.label: Main offer text
elements.description: Bold, white text stating 'Hungry? We got you Free delivery over $15' is centrally positioned at the bottom.
elements.text_content: Hungry? We got you Free delivery over $15

elements.label: Sale announcement
elements.description: The text 'FreshDash SALE' is prominently displayed at the top in a contrasting color, indicating a promotional offer.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A bright button labeled 'Book now' is located at the bottom center, encouraging user interaction.

elements.label: Price display
elements.description: The price '$4.99' is shown in a bold font at the bottom left, drawing attention to the cost.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small badge labeled 'UGC' is positioned at the top left, indicating user-generated content.
